existing_builder_assessment.reason: The builder requires an exact gaussian-asymmetric-catalysis-study/1, gaussian-asymmetric-ts-candidate/1, metal-support design, and M2a template chain. R33 is a non-asymmetric benchmark smoke object with no source-supported two-channel selectivity study, and the existing P0 inventory is not that formal candidate. Emitting those prerequisites would require synthetic or inferred chemistry.

prerequisites.name: p0_candidate_inventory
blockers: This is a provisional P0 inventory and does not satisfy the formal asymmetric TS candidate schema or scientific review gate.

prerequisites.name: asymmetric_study
blockers: The available R33 sources do not define two source-supported stereochemical or selectivity channels required by the existing asymmetric study contract.

prerequisites.name: formal_ts_candidate
blockers: Chemical atom roles, coordination assignments, elementary-step identity, channel identity, and candidate dimensions are not source-closed.

prerequisites.name: metal_support_design
blockers: design-metal-support cannot be run without a semantically valid reviewed study; no synthetic study is permitted for this real R33 record.

prerequisites.name: metal_m2a_template
blockers: build-metal-ts-audit-template requires the exact formal candidate and design, both of which remain unavailable.

prerequisites.name: metal_m1_review_source
blockers: The existing source schema requires design, template, and formal-candidate hashes that cannot be honestly supplied.

prerequisites.name: metal_m1_sidecar
blockers: No real sidecar may be generated until the exact non-synthetic upstream chain exists; the contract-probe synthetic sidecar is not reused.
Charge +1 is source-reported, but formal oxidation state, ligand-charge convention, d count, total electron count, and parity remain null.
Multiplicity 1 is source-reported for the investigated closed-shell set, but alternative multiplicities and crossing relevance have no candidate-bound review.
Restricted, unrestricted, RO, or broken-symmetry choice and stability, S-squared, occupation, alternative-solution, and multireference policies remain absent.
One-based distances are measured, but coordination number, geometry, ligand identities, denticity, hapticity, occupancy, and distance windows are not assigned.
Literature method contexts are not protocol defaults; no candidate-bound method, basis/ECP, relativity, solvent, thermochemistry, or three-tier selection exists.
Exact endpoint identities, elementary-step class, chemical atom map, mode displacement, IRC evidence, and TS strategy remain absent or unsupported.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No reviewed source assigns formal Pt oxidation state to the exact N2 R33 object.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Source-located candidate-specific oxidation-state decision and bookkeeping convention.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Exact ligand identities and formal charges are not reported for the N2 object.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewed ligand identities, formal charges, and non-innocent alternatives.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No source-reported d count is bound to R33.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewer-confirmed d count tied to the accepted oxidation and ligand-charge convention.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: The source does not report a reviewed total electron count for the exact object.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewer-supplied total electron count with explicit counting convention.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Parity was not copied or derived because it cannot establish multiplicity.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewer-recorded parity cross-check that does not infer the spin state.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: The source reports a closed-shell singlet treatment but does not enumerate alternatives for R33.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Candidate-bound credible multiplicity inventory and common reference.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No single-surface, spin-crossover, two-state, or MECP assessment is reported for R33.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewer decision on surface relationships and crossing relevance.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Closed-shell singlet treatment does not explicitly identify the Auto-G16 restricted, unrestricted, RO, or broken-symmetry hypothesis.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Candidate-specific wavefunction hypothesis and rejection/escalation rule.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Cross-program lowest-energy checks are not a candidate-bound stability-analysis policy.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewed stability test, acceptance criterion, and evidence locator.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No candidate-bound S-squared observation or tolerance is reported.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: State-specific S-squared target, observed evidence, and rejection tolerance.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Occupation character and alternative solutions are not reported for the exact candidate.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Hash-bound orbital/occupation review and alternative-solution search policy.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Several diagnostics are observed, but no universal threshold is accepted and no candidate-specific policy is reported.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: System-specific diagnostic set, criteria, reviewer decision, and escalation path.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Distances alone do not establish coordination number, geometry, or contact acceptance windows.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewed coordination number, geometry, complete contacts, and distance windows.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: The N2 coordinate object lacks source-located ligand-role assignments.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Ligand identities, stoichiometry, denticity, hapticity, and hemilability.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No exact substrate, counterion, ion-pair, solvent, or additive occupancy is reported.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewer-accepted complete species and occupancy inventory.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: H/D-scrambling context and distance changes do not assign the exact N2 elementary step.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Source-located elementary-step class and reactant/TS/product identities.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Element order is preserved, but chemical roles and forming/breaking/transferring pairs are unreviewed.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: One-based chemical atom map and intended reaction-coordinate pairs.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No raw imaginary frequency, displacement, bidirectional IRC, or identified endpoints are available.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Exactly-one-imaginary-mode review and separately gated path evidence appropriate to metal support.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: Reported literature contexts are not a candidate-bound protocol or per-element acceptance record.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewed method, basis by element, ECP identity/core size, and relativity plan.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No approved solvent, temperature, standard state, or low-frequency policy exists.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewed solvent and thermochemistry model with all comparison conventions.

gap_ledger.evidence_limit: No candidate-bound strategy evidence supports selecting one of the three design candidates.
gap_ledger.required_human_fact: Reviewed Hessian, endpoint, or scan evidence while execution selection remains separately gated.
